All right, welcome back. We're going to take a look at an example of the non-problem problem in action. So this one also came from the 10X freelance copywriter 2017, and this was a closing day email. So subject line was the last day to be a 10X freelance copywriter, had a countdown timer, and then it starts with the core promise. Good news, in about four to six months from now, growing your freelance copywriting business, and having your revenue levels match your skill set will no longer be a problem. So that's our core promise. In one sentence, either you'll have made it, you know, and this is the moment of highest pleasure, banking five figure months under reg, having a long wait list of high-end clients clamoring for your keyboard, being at the helm of the healthy email list, lining your pockets with leverage revenue through product launches and affiliate campaigns, enjoying the support of automated systems, a talented VA and a dialed in process that makes all of the above run smoother than a factory fresh Tesla. So moment of highest pleasure, or you'll have given in to some sort of holding pattern, normalizing the sub power in consistent months, making your lifestyle goals fit into client budgets and timelines, constantly living under the threat of having to go back to a day job as we deal with scope creep late payments, flaky prospects, non-existent lead flow, nervous partners and the severe lack of REM sleep that comes with all of the above. So moment of highest tension, contrasting the two one after the other, because here's the deal. Big dreams need water into the 10x freelance copywriter is what takes your seed of ambition to become a well paid freelancer and lathers it with industrial grade miracle grow organic. Of course, if you're dead set on staying middle of the pack and can digest the reality above with a combo of sleep and Sundays and working in a snuggie, I'm not here to convince you otherwise. So here we're framing our product as a difference between the moment of highest pleasure and a moment of highest tension. But if you are committed to fast and at times scary growth, if you're totally cool with 30 to 40 hour work weeks, knowing that every one of those hours is fully optimized, focus and engineered for traction and momentum and are willing to let me coach you through the advanced business building mindset, strategy, systems and processes that can make your, your scent 10 times faster and more profitable. Let's do this already. So this is the exclusively empowered clothes. We're essentially just saying if you're cool with those 30 to 40 hour work weeks, that is what is exclusively empowering them to join this program and get those results, make that journey from point eight, uh, from point eight to point B. And then the PS, this is where we future pace the new upgraded problems and really, um, end by selling the new problems because those are often going to be more believable than the moment of highest pleasure just by human nature alone. Um, while the decision to be a well paid freelance copywriter will seize to be a problem in a few months from now, there will be new problems, exciting problems, upgraded problems, solutions bring exponential growth and impact and income, problems like, and then these are legit and super specific. How do I best use my VA to free up time and focus on my most highly leveraged tasks? How do I layer in new revenue streams? Do I create a course affiliate launches all of the above all at the same time? How do I manage my day to day to deliver a client work, develop new programs, trainings, build my authority, grow my email list, network with influencers, speak at conferences and do all the other things associated with building a high earning copywriting business. All problems will probably solve in the next few months together. So while yes, we are actually solving these future problems inside our product, they are coming as a result of ha having first delivered on the core promise and overcoming, um, the main problems, the moment of highest tension, giving them, um, the core promise of growing the freelance business. And then they're going to have these upgraded problems. That's not necessary for your product to always solve the new problems that arise. In this case, they do. What's more important here is just listing out the problems that emerge after you first solve the core problem that, um, your audience needs you to. So that is the non problem. Problem it focuses on point A, which is the moment of highest tension, what they're currently experiencing moment of highest pleasure, what they will be or what they should be based off of things that exclusively, exclusively empower them to make that leap. And then the new problems that arise once they have achieved it. So that's it. Give it a shot and I'll see you in the next video.
